recommendations.title: Zenon: Girl of the 21st Century
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar, a 13-year-old girl who lives on a space station in the year 2049, gets into some trouble and is banished to Earth. With help from some Earth friends she must find her way back.

recommendations.title: Don't Look Under the Bed
recommendations.overview: A girl calls on her brother's imaginary friend to banish a mischievous boogeyman who has framed her for his pranks.

recommendations.title: Short Circuit 2
recommendations.overview: Robot Johnny 5 moves to the city to help his friend Ben Jahrvi with his toy manufacturing enterprise, only to be manipulated by criminals who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Hulk
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: An accidental overdose of gamma radiation causes a mutation in scientist David Banner's DNA: now whenever he becomes angry, he metamorphoses into a seven-foot-tall, 330-pound, mindless muscular green creature.

recommendations.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
recommendations.overview: As the world falls, young Furiosa is snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers into the hands of a great biker horde led by the warlord Dementus. Sweeping through the wasteland, they encounter the citadel presided over by Immortan Joe. The two ty

recommendations.title: Iron Man
recommendations.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

recommendations.title: First Blood
recommendations.overview: When former Green Beret John Rambo is harassed by local law enforcement and arrested for vagrancy, he is forced to flee into the mountains and wage an escalating one-man war against his pursuers.

recommendations.title: Serenity
recommendations.overview: When the renegade crew of Serenity agrees to hide a fugitive on their ship, they find themselves in an action-packed battle between the relentless military might of a totalitarian regime who will destroy anything – or anyone – to get the girl back an

recommendations.title: Superman vs. The Elite
recommendations.overview: The Man of Steel finds himself outshone by a new team of ruthless superheroes who hold his idealism in contempt.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
